title: Evasive Enchantments
description: Adds 7 new enchantments to make movement much more fast-paced and engaging
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IrCIEVpeNIM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# This datapack requires [Player Motion 1.4.2 (specifically)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/player_motion/version/1.4.2)! Make sure to download that as well, or it will not work!
This datapack adds 7 new enchantments to give you more style and more speed while moving around your world:

- **Double Jump** - Boots - Press space midair to double jump. The higher the level, the more jumps before needing to touch the ground (max 3 for both). Gives a -0.75 fall damage multiplier. - Incompatible with Feather Falling, Depth Strider, Soul Speed
- **Dash** - Leggings - Press shift while holding W and midair to perform a dash, launching yourself forwards. The higher the level, the more dashes before needing to touch the ground (max 3 for both). - Incompatible with Swift Sneak
- **Strafe** - Chestplate - Hold shift and press A, S, or D to cancel out all of your existing velocity perform a small dash left, backwards, or right respectively. (max level 1)
- **Propeller** - Helmet - While sneaking, float upwards. If you are falling with high enough downwards velocity, gain slow falling (max level 1). Gives a -1 fall damage multiplier
- **Pogo Stick** - Hoe - Punch a block to launch yourself backwards away from it, resetting the jump and dash count that limits your number before needing to touch the ground again (max level 1)
- **Rebound** - Sword - Attack something while falling downwards to give yourself an upwards boost and reset your dash & jump counters (max level 1)
- **Aerodynamics** - All armour - Hold W midair to accelerate forwards, gaining speed while avoiding drag (max level 1, effects can stack with multiple pieces)

You can find all of these directly from the enchanting table.
Have fun and beware not to come down with a fatal case of the Zoomies. Visit our [PMC Page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/evasive-enchants/) for comments etc, or DM me **@theai.** on discord.
